nodes.label: SSH remote execution environment with ControlMaster connection persistence.
Fail fast with a clear error when the SSH client is unavailable.
Run commands on a remote machine over SSH.      Spawn-per-call: every execute()
Detect the remote user's home directory.
Create base ~/.mangaba directory tree on remote in one SSH call.
Upload a single file via scp over ControlMaster.
Upload many files in a single tar-over-SSH stream.          Pipes ``tar c`` on t
Download remote .mangaba/ as a tar archive.
Batch-delete remote files in one SSH call.
Sync files to remote via FileSyncManager (rate-limited internally).
Spawn an SSH process that runs bash on the remote host.
